issues.before: risk of research/current mixing across conversations
issues.repair_applied: unique CURRENT verification plus hash-bound repo runtime authority
issues.remaining_blocker: none; V6 research still cannot auto-promote

issues.before: legacy model primary accuracy was below market on matched samples
issues.repair_applied: research champion changed to synchronized de-vigged market primary with frozen selective margin gate; legacy model is residual/fallback only
issues.remaining_blocker: fresh post-freeze settled sample and Wilson gate

issues.before: low draw Top-1 recall was treated as if draw probability itself were broken
issues.repair_applied: calibration audit separated probability quality from argmax; forced draw rewrites rejected and locked
issues.remaining_blocker: only orthogonal PIT context may challenge prospectively

issues.before: record presence was previously mistaken for strict roster completeness
issues.repair_applied: V6.6.4 same-provider repair plus V6.6.9 strict CURRENT_FIRST_TEAM overlay contract; only validated complete single-source/contract-qualified rosters count and no player-list union is permitted
issues.current_evidence: domains=17; latest_teams=336; baseline_strict=271; overlay_status=PASS; overlay_additions=1; effective_strict=272; remaining_gap=64; sub18_before_repair=65; direct_repairs=0
issues.remaining_blocker: obtain contract-qualified current first-team evidence for the remaining 64 teams; provisional prior-season continuity never satisfies this gate

issues.before: empty coach/injury/transaction fields could look complete and machine coach observations could bypass the dedicated manager evidence contract
issues.repair_applied: field-specific source-health gates plus verified manager overlay; V6.6.10 makes machine coach descriptive-only and requires the official-or-two-independent-source manager gate for eligibility
issues.remaining_blocker: acquire real current manager/change evidence plus remaining availability context; no algorithmic shortcut is permitted

issues.before: canonical snapshot retained only one AH/OU main line while raw provider exposed many lines
issues.repair_applied: V6.8.0 preserves all full-time prematch 1X2/AH/total ladders with raw hash linkage

issues.before: risk of extrapolating a complete integer distribution from one O/U line
issues.repair_applied: direct CDF identification only from observed half-goal lines; exact market-only 0-7+ requires 0.5..6.5 all present; missing buckets are never fabricated
issues.remaining_blocker: current ladders identify only partial CDF; complete distribution therefore needs an explicit prior plus audited market projection

issues.before: old shadow solver was hard-coded to 1X2+OU2.5 and the old outcome scorer could receive a formal matrix again at settlement time
issues.repair_applied: V6.8.2 supports multiple half-goal total constraints; V6.8.5 consumes only validated immutable formal freezes, stores both matrices plus hashes pre-match, and settlement cannot reproject/recalculate
issues.remaining_blocker: accumulate post-epoch validated formal freezes with sufficiently fresh market ladders, then settled OOS score/total evidence

issues.before: legacy consensus receipt stayed at zero after newer exact-line n=2 consensus files were created
issues.repair_applied: V6.8.3 scans the evidence directory itself and refreshes the legacy receipt for all downstream consumers
issues.remaining_blocker: none for inventory; outcome evidence is separate

issues.before: stale downstream report incorrectly implied no consensus and legacy scoring did not bind both matrices at prediction time
issues.repair_applied: consensus inventory refresh plus V6.8.5 named no-backfill epoch and immutable stored-matrix-only settlement
issues.remaining_blocker: minimum prospective sample, competition coverage and paired proper-score/bootstrap gates

issues.before: exact-score Top-1 can be mistaken for a high-confidence point forecast
issues.repair_applied: exact score remains a probability ranking from one audited joint matrix; no hand-picked score; failed/nonconverged matrices fail closed
issues.current_evidence: V6.8.2/V6.8.5 expose frozen Top1, Top2, gap, Top3 cumulative and score metrics without claiming certainty
issues.remaining_blocker: irreducible score uncertainty remains; improvement requires forward evidence

issues.before: risk of value claims without actual tradable frozen prices or with failed matrix
issues.repair_applied: retain CURRENT rule: no EV/minimum price/value without actual frozen price; score/AH/OU EV unavailable when unified matrix fails
